# Daily Report — 2026-06-02

## Task Completed
Added `list_incident_comments` tool that fetches journal entries (comments and work notes)
for a given incident from the `sys_journal_field` table.

Key features:
- Accepts incident number (e.g. INC0010001) or 32-char sys_id
- Optional `entry_type` filter: `"comments"` (customer-visible) or `"work_notes"` (internal)
- Pagination via `limit` / `offset` with `has_more` and `next_offset` in response
- Each entry includes `sys_id`, `type`, `value`, `created_on`, `created_by`
- Registered in `service_desk` and `full` tool packages

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1364 (15 new)
- Coverage: 92%
- All passing: yes

## Security
- urllib3 2.6.3 — PYSEC-2026-141 (not a direct dependency; no action needed)
- wheel 0.42.0 — CVE-2026-24049 (dev tooling only; no runtime impact)

- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/incident_task_tools.py` — added `ListIncidentCommentsParams` model and `list_incident_comments` function
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — exported `list_incident_comments`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — imported and registered `list_incident_comments`
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added to `service_desk` and `full` packages
- `tests/test_list_incident_comments.py` — 15 new tests
